rag_rules: Preserve the AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component type or implementation scopes
Place component type annexes in the component type scope, and implementation annexes in the implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use the authoritative AADL model structure for component names, ports, and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Insert implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
